project: N.E.I. Sprint 0.x — Security P0 + Ops Foundation
description:
技术栈: Next.js 15.5 App Router + React 18 + TypeScript(strict) + Prisma 5.22 + PostgreSQL(Neon) + 自实现 HMAC session(lib/session.ts) + R2 存储(lib/storage.ts) + MCP(app/api/mcp/route.ts)。部署用 npm run vercel-build(含 prisma db push)。本地无 DATABASE_URL, 验收以 npx tsc --noEmit 为准。改 prisma/schema.prisma 后必须先 npx prisma generate 再 typecheck。
本 Sprint 目标: 清零 6 个安全 P0(MCP 竞态/XSS/SESSION_SECRET/rate limit/OAuth state/open redirect) + 可运营基础(帖子编辑/软删除、精品字段、管理员后台)。已确认决策: 软删除(Post.deletedAt)、User.isAdmin+ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_EMAILS 引导首批、作者+管理员可编辑/删除。不含内容生产。

userStories.title: 修复 MCP 跨用户竞态(currentUid 全局变量)
userStories.description: As a platform operator I want MCP tool handlers to read the authenticated user from a per-request closure instead of a module-level global, so that concurrent requests from different users cannot leak each other's favorited skills.
acceptanceCriteria: Module-level `let currentUid` is removed from app/api/mcp/route.ts
All three tool handlers (search_skills/get_skill/list_my_skills) read uid from a per-request closure parameter; list_my_skills where clause uses that per-request uid (not a global)
POST/GET/DELETE still return 401 on invalid/missing Bearer token before invoking the handler
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: two concurrent MCP calls with different tokens return each user's own favorites, no cross-contamination

userStories.title: 加固 sanitizeHtml 防 XSS(属性白名单+javascript scheme)
userStories.description: As a reader I want post bodies sanitized with an attribute allowlist, so that stored XSS payloads (on* handlers, javascript: URLs, img onerror) cannot execute when rendered via dangerouslySetInnerHTML.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/validate.ts sanitizeHtml strips all attributes not in an allowlist (only a.href / img.src / img.alt allowed); on* event handler attributes are removed regardless of quoting style
javascript: and data: URL schemes on href/src are rejected
post.body rendering path at app/posts/[id]/page.tsx (around lines 184/190/199) does not bypass sanitization
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: a post with `` and `` renders without executing any script

userStories.title: SESSION_SECRET 启动校验
userStories.description: As a platform operator I want the app to fail fast when SESSION_SECRET is missing or is the default dev value in production, so that session cookies and API-key encryption cannot be forged.
acceptanceCriteria: In production (NODE_ENV==='production'), if SESSION_SECRET is unset or equals 'dev-secret-change-me', the app throws at module load of session/crypto
lib/session.ts:7 and lib/crypto.ts:10 share one guarded secret resolution (e.g. a new lib/secret.ts)
Dev mode (NODE_ENV!=='production') still works with the default secret
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: rate limit 基础设施(内存 Map)
userStories.description: As a platform operator I want a reusable in-memory rate limiter, so that auth endpoints and uploads can be protected from brute-force and abuse.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/rate-limit.ts exports checkRateLimit(key: string, limit: number, windowMs: number) returning { ok: boolean; retryAfter: number } with lazy expiry and periodic cleanup
No new runtime dependencies are added (pure in-memory Map)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 发码与登录接口加 rate limit
userStories.description: As a platform operator I want verification-code sending and login failures rate-limited, so that email bombing and password brute-force are mitigated.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/verify-email returns 429 with retryAfter when an email exceeds 3 sends per 10 min, or an IP exceeds 10 per 10 min
POST /api/auth/login returns 429 (generic message) when an email exceeds 5 failed attempts per 15 min
Rate-limit checks use checkRateLimit from US-004; register and reset-password also get IP-level limiting
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: calling verify-email 4 times for the same email returns 429 on the 4th

userStories.title: GitHub OAuth state 参数(CSRF 防护)
userStories.description: As a user I want the GitHub OAuth flow to include a signed state parameter, so that a CSRF attack cannot make my browser complete a login as an attacker.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/auth/github generates a signed state cookie and appends state to the GitHub authorize URL
GET /api/auth/github/callback rejects requests whose state query does not match the cookie, redirecting to /login?error=invalid_state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: normal GitHub login completes; a callback with a tampered state is rejected

userStories.title: login redirect 校验 + 验证码 CSPRNG + 用户枚举模糊
userStories.description: As a user I want the next redirect restricted to same-origin paths, verification codes generated with a CSPRNG, and login errors not to reveal whether an email is registered.
acceptanceCriteria: app/login/page.tsx only redirects to a next path that starts with a single / and is not // (protocol-relative); otherwise redirects to /
app/api/auth/verify-email/route.ts:13 uses crypto.randomInt(100000, 1000000) instead of Math.random()
app/api/auth/login/route.ts and app/api/auth/reset-password/route.ts return a generic error that does not distinguish 'account does not exist' from other failures
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: ?next=//evil.com redirects to /, not off-site

userStories.title: User.isAdmin 字段 + ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_EMAILS 引导
userStories.description: As a platform operator I want an isAdmin flag on users and a way to bootstrap the first admins from env, so that administrative actions can be gated.
acceptanceCriteria: prisma/schema.prisma User model has `isAdmin Boolean @default(false)`

On user create (register route, github callback, seed), if the user's email is in ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_EMAILS (comma-separated env), isAdmin is set true; a helper like lib/admin.ts shouldBootstrapAdmin(email) is used
getCurrentUser (lib/session.ts:61) select includes isAdmin
npx prisma validate and npx tsc --noEmit pass (run `npx prisma generate` after the schema change)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Post 软删除字段(deletedAt) + 查询过滤
userStories.description: As a platform operator I want posts to be soft-deletable (deletedAt) and all public queries to exclude soft-deleted posts, so that deletions are recoverable and soft-deleted content never appears publicly.
acceptanceCriteria: prisma/schema.prisma Post model has `deletedAt DateTime?` with `@@index([deletedAt])`

`deletedAt: null` (or equivalent) is applied in: lib/feed.ts buildFeedWhere, app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts, app/api/v1/skills/[id]/route.ts, app/api/v1/skills/[id]/raw/route.ts, app/api/skills/[id]/execute/route.ts, app/api/mcp/route.ts get_skill, app/posts/[id]/page.tsx, app/stage/[value]/page.tsx, lib/skills-map.ts, app/page.tsx counts, app/api/v1/stats/route.ts, app/profile/[id]/page.tsx (non-owner views), app/dashboard/page.tsx topPosts
npx prisma validate and npx tsc --noEmit pass (run `npx prisma generate`)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: after soft-deleting a post (via DB), it no longer appears in feed/search/profile/skills-map, and its detail page 404s

userStories.title: 帖子编辑 API(PATCH /api/posts/[id])
userStories.description: As an author I want to edit my own published post (and admins to edit any), via PATCH, so that typos and stale content can be corrected without deleting.
acceptanceCriteria: PATCH /api/posts/[id] updates title/body/tags for the post; returns 403 if the caller is neither the author nor an admin, 404 if the post is soft-deleted
Input reuses the validation and sanitizeHtml path from POST /api/posts (no userId/status tampering)
A canEditPost(uid, post) helper (author or isAdmin) is used for authorization
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 帖子软删除 API(DELETE /api/posts/[id])
userStories.description: As an author I want to soft-delete my own post (and admins any), so that content can be removed from public view while remaining recoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: DELETE /api/posts/[id] sets deletedAt to now; returns 403 if the caller is neither author nor admin, 404 if already deleted or not found
After deletion the post is absent from all public queries (covered by US-009); comments/favorites are kept (not cascaded)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: deleting a post as author removes it from the feed

userStories.title: 管理员置顶/精选 API + Post.featured 字段
userStories.description: As an admin I want to mark posts as featured via an API, so that curated workflows can surface on the homepage instead of static hardcoding.
acceptanceCriteria: prisma/schema.prisma Post has `featured Boolean @default(false)`
PATCH /api/admin/posts/[id]/feature sets featured true/false; returns 403 for non-admins
A requireAdmin() guard helper (lib/auth-guard.ts) rejects non-admin callers with 403
npx prisma validate and npx tsc --noEmit pass (run `npx prisma generate`)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 帖子编辑入口(作者 + 管理员)
userStories.description: As an author I want an edit button on my posts (and admins on any) that opens an edit form prefilled with current content, so that I can update a post without leaving the site.
acceptanceCriteria: app/posts/[id]/page.tsx shows an edit control when the viewer is the author or an admin (uses getCurrentUser isAdmin)
The edit form submits to PATCH /api/posts/[id] and reflects changes on success
Soft-deleted posts show no edit control and render a 404/gone state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: author can edit own post; non-author without admin sees no edit control

userStories.title: 管理员控制台(删除/置顶)
userStories.description: As an admin I want a console at /admin listing all posts (including soft-deleted) with delete/feature controls, so that I can moderate content.
acceptanceCriteria: /admin route is gated by requireAdmin; non-admins are redirected to / with an error
The console lists posts (with a toggle to show soft-deleted) and offers delete (soft) and feature/unfeature actions
Actions call the DELETE and feature APIs from US-011/US-012
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: admin can soft-delete and feature a post; non-admin is blocked

userStories.title: FeaturedWorkflows 改读 DB(featured 帖子)
userStories.description: As a homepage visitor I want the curated workflows section to show real featured posts from the database, so that curation is data-driven rather than hardcoded.
acceptanceCriteria: components/home/FeaturedWorkflows.tsx reads featured posts (where featured:true, deletedAt:null, status:published) instead of the static WORKFLOWS array
Falls back gracefully (empty state or fewer cards) when no posts are featured
The component stays a server component and keeps the existing card styling
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using agent-browser: featuring a post via admin console makes it appear in the section
